build_sh_sanitizer:
set -e
mkdir -p build-asan-3503 && cd build-asan-3503
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined -g -O0' -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined -g -O0' -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined' -DCMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS='-fsanitize=address,undefined' -DNCNN_BUILD_TESTS=OFF -DNCNN_BUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF -DNCNN_BUILD_BENCHMARK=OFF -DNCNN_VULKAN=OFF -DNCNN_OPENMP=OFF -DNCNN_PYTHON=OFF -DNCNN_BUILD_TOOLS=ON
cmake --build . --target ncnnoptimize -j$(nproc)
build_sh_cov:
set -e
mkdir -p build-cov-3503 && cd build-cov-3503
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g' -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g' -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DNCNN_BUILD_TESTS=OFF -DNCNN_BUILD_EXAMPLES=OFF -DNCNN_BUILD_BENCHMARK=OFF -DNCNN_VULKAN=OFF -DNCNN_OPENMP=OFF -DNCNN_PYTHON=OFF -DNCNN_BUILD_TOOLS=ON
cmake --build . --target ncnnoptimize -j$(nproc)
expected_fingerprint:
find_blob_index_by_name conv1 failed
AddressSanitizer: SEGV
ncnn::Net::load_param
